title: Ubiquiti MUSB-1A-B-5 Power Supply with microUSB for UFiber Loco, 5-Pack
description: MUSB-1A-B-5 is a set of 5 power adapters with output voltage 5V, maximum current 1A and microUSB connector. The power adapter is primarily intended for UFiber Loco from Ubiquiti, but it will also be used for other products with a microUSB connector and their maximum power consumption will not exceed 5W GPSR Technical support for this product is available on [email protected] email or sending a request via web form . Our technical support is available during this business hours
